idea-plugin.name: Github Copilot ToolBox
idea-plugin.description:
GitHub Copilot toolbox — JetBrains preview (same hub UI as VS Code via JCEF).

What you get
  • JCEF hub: MCP & skills, Intelligence bridges (Cursor + Claude Code → Copilot), One Click Setup, Thinking Machine helpers.
  • Bundled Node CLIs: cursor-mcp-to-github-copilot-port, cursor-rules-to-github-copilot, github-copilot-memory-bank (from sibling packages/github-copilot-toolbox/node_modules — run npm install there before Gradle).
  • Project settings: .github/copilot-toolbox-settings.json (mirrors VS Code copilot-toolbox.* used by the hub).
  • Tools → Github Copilot ToolBox for JSON + Node path.
Resources
  • Source
  • Issues
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 0.1.3: Docs alignment — README and project site highlight VS Code Marketplace and JetBrains Marketplace installs (extension 1.0.17).
  • 0.1.2: Replace deprecated Messages.showChooseDialog in the Port Claude MCP flow (Marketplace verifier compatibility).
  • 0.1.1: Merge-only MCP/skills/memory-bank behavior (parity with VS Code 1.0.16); hub + Kotlin parity updates.
  • 0.1.0: Initial JetBrains port from Cloude Code ToolBox IntelliJ baseline — Copilot commands, .github paths, bundled Copilot bridge CLIs.
